title: The Ballad of Billy McCrae
overview: Chris Blythe returns to his home town in Wales after losing a fortune in Canada. He falls in love with Elen, a volatile and charismatic woman. But Elen's father Billy is a dangerous man. And Chris finds himself torn between love and hate.

trailers.title: The Ballad of Billy McCrae | Trailer | In UK Cinemas September 24
